## What changed

Describe the behavior and user impact.

## Why

Link the issue or explain the concrete problem.

## Safety and compatibility

Describe any effect on provider limits, authentication, permissions, sandboxing,
account ownership, state files, or compatibility aliases.

## Verification

- [ ] Relevant unit tests pass in Linux or WSL.
- [ ] CLI/package smoke checks pass when applicable.
- [ ] No credentials, private prompts, transcripts, or personal paths are included.
- [ ] Documentation and changelog are updated when user-facing behavior changes.
